# IFRS 9 Credit Risk Dataset

This folder contains an external structured credit-risk dataset used for
portfolio analytics and dashboard examples.

## Source

Dataset:

```text
Credit Risk Dataset
```

Creator:

```text
Lao Tse
```

Source URL:

```text
https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/laotse/credit-risk-dataset
```

License:

```text
CC0: Public Domain
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
```

## File

```text
credit_risk_dataset_cleaned.csv
```

Observed shape:

```text
Rows: 29,465
Columns: 13
Target: loan_status
```

## Usage

This dataset supports:

- portfolio analytics;
- default-rate analysis;
- Azure SQL fact tables;
- Power BI dashboard metrics;
- future model-monitoring and responsible-AI examples.

It does not replace the synthetic document dataset used for RAG, citations,
policy search, and document-governance workflows.
